hero.eyebrow: Train for the race, not just the run
hero.body: Pick your race, set your goal time, and get a week-by-week training plan. When life gets in the way, ask your coach — it proposes a safe adjustment in seconds, and nothing changes until you approve it.
hero.freeNote: Everything you need to train is free — plans, GPS tracking, races, and the coach (with a daily fair-use limit so it stays free).

plans.label: plans built to your race date

adapts.label: your coach reshapes the plan in seconds

features.heading: Everything between today and the start line.
features.sub: Not another feed of other people's runs — a plan, a coach, and the tools to follow through.

coach.title: An AI coach that adapts your plan
coach.body: Knee acting up? Missed a week? Ask, and your coach proposes a safe edit in seconds — it edits the schedule, it never hands you a risky one, and nothing changes until you approve it.

plan.title: A real training plan
plan.body: Base, build, peak, taper — around your race date, goal time, and the days you can actually train. Choose your method: Polarized 80/20, Hansons-style, 3-Day Quality, or Run/Walk. No black box — open any session to see exactly how it's built.

track.title: Track every run
track.body: Live GPS with pace, distance, and elevation on a map. Pair heart rate on Android and every run is classified into training zones — so you know if you went too hard.

races.title: Find your race
races.body: A community race catalogue — from the Berlin Marathon to local 10Ks. Pick one, and your countdown and plan lock onto it. It's still growing, so if yours isn't listed, add it in seconds — for everyone.

progress.title: Watch it add up
progress.body: History, stats, and trends in one place, with gentle badges as your training weeks add up — from your first 5K to the 1000 km club.

import.title: Bring your running history with you
import.body: Import your runs from Strava, Garmin, Zepp or anywhere else — GPX, TCX and CSV exports all work. Or sync finished runs straight from your watch: Apple Health on iPhone, Health Connect on Android, or connect your Polar account.

cta.heading: Ready to run your best race?
cta.body: Create a free account and get your training plan in minutes — everything you need to train is included, with a daily fair-use limit on the coach. iOS and Android apps in beta.

mock.userMsg: My knee's been sore since Sunday's long run.
mock.reply1: Let's take the pressure off while it settles — no speed work until it's pain-free. Here's what I'd change this week:
mock.reply2: And if it lingers more than a few days, get it checked before we rebuild.
